pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency for API documentation.
Replace H2 in-memory database dependency with PostgreSQL driver.
Add duplicate spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependency (likely accidental or restructuring).

src/main/java/com/example/jwtsecurity/se.general_idea: Inject CustomUserDetailsService to load user details for authentication instead of creating a token with empty authorities.
src/main/java/com/example/jwtsecurity/se.after: var userDetails = userDetailsService.loadUserByUsername(username); var auth = new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(userDetails, null, userDetails.getAuthorities());

src/main/java/com/example/jwtsecurity/se.general_idea: Add constructor injection for CustomUserDetailsService, replacing implicit or Lombok-based injection.
Remove unused import java.util.Collections after switching from empty list to user authorities.
Add Swagger UI and API docs paths to the whitelist of unauthenticated endpoints.
Rename filterChain parameter to chain for brevity and consistency.
Remove Turkish comments and clean up code formatting.
Add @EnableMethodSecurity annotation to enable method-level security pre/post annotations.
Define JwtAuthFilter bean to allow Spring to manage its lifecycle and dependency injection.
Define PasswordEncoder bean using BCrypt for secure password hashing.
Define AuthenticationProvider bean to configure DaoAuthenticationProvider with custom user details and password encoder.
Define AuthenticationManager bean to expose the authentication manager from configuration.
Inject AuthenticationProvider into SecurityFilterChain configuration to use the custom provider.
src/main/java/com/example/jwtsecurity/se.before: SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, JwtAuthFilter jwtAuthFilter) throws Exception {

src/main/java/com/example/jwtsecurity/se.general_idea: Register the custom AuthenticationProvider with HttpSecurity.
Add permitAll rules for Swagger UI endpoints to allow unauthenticated access to API documentation.
Remove commented-out H2 console permitAll rule and associated comments.
Clean up import statements by removing unused imports and adding necessary ones for new beans.
